# Summary

Describe what changed and why.

# Changed Areas

Check all that apply:

- [ ] Firmware logic
- [ ] Screen/UI
- [ ] Buttons
- [ ] Battery measurement
- [ ] Wi-Fi settings portal
- [ ] NVS storage/history
- [ ] Hardware documentation
- [ ] Project documentation
- [ ] Build/configuration

# Verification

- [ ] `idf.py build`
- [ ] Flashed hardware, if needed
- [ ] Screen turns on
- [ ] Expected firmware version is visible at the bottom
- [ ] `+` and `-` change the row counter
- [ ] Universal button behavior checked
- [ ] Battery percentage shown
- [ ] Documentation updated, if behavior or commands changed

# Risks and Unchecked Areas

List anything that was not tested or may need follow-up.
